nasb.text: Desire realized is sweet to the soul, But it is an abomination to fools to turn away from evil.

esv.text: A desire fulfilled is sweet to the soul, but to turn away from evil is an abomination to fools.

cnv.text: 所願的成功，使人心裡甘甜； 遠離惡事，卻為愚昧人憎惡。

ccb.text: 愿望实现使心甘甜， 远离恶事为愚人憎恶。

csbs.text: 愿望成就，心里甘甜； 远离恶事，被愚昧人憎恶。
